2026-04-01T06:42:20.5345909Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-01T06:42:20.5346470Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-01T06:42:20.5346885Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-01T06:42:20.5347574Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-01T06:42:20.5347901Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-01T06:42:20.5348131Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-01T06:42:20.5348295Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-01T06:42:20.5348470Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-01T06:42:20.5348636Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-01T06:42:20.5348859Z [36;1m{[0m
